allow: Bash(find 1-single-experiments/ -name '*.yaml' -exec sed -i -e s/mysql-ha-cluster/md/g -e 's/name: mysql-/name: mariadb-/g' -e s/containerNames:/containerNames:/g -e 's/    - mysql$/    - mariadb/' -e 's/targetPort: "33061"/targetPort: "4567"/' -e 's|volumePath: "/var/lib/mysql"|volumePath: "/var/lib/mysql"|' '{}' +)
Bash(find tests/ -name '*.yaml' -exec sed -i -e s/mysql-ha-cluster/md/g -e 's/name: mysql-/name: mariadb-/g' -e 's/    - mysql$/    - mariadb/' -e 's/targetPort: "33061"/targetPort: "4567"/' '{}' +)
Bash(find 2-scheduled-experiments/ 3-workflows/ -name '*.yaml' -exec sed -i -e s/mysql-ha-cluster/md/g -e 's/name: mysql-/name: mariadb-/g' -e 's/    - mysql$/    - mariadb/' '{}' +)
